_meta.notes: /Industries/{slug}/ pages are blog/news category index pages with capitalized 'Industries' in the URL. Typical structure: category name as heading, optional intro prose, and an auto-generated grid of posts (each with image, categories, date, title, URL). In Statamic this becomes a taxonomy with a custom route; entries hold any curated intro text.

prompt: Extract a warehausae.com /Industries/{slug}/ category page. Capture the category name, optional intro prose, and the list of posts shown on the page.
systemPrompt: Extracting a category index page. Use null or empty arrays for missing fields.

category_name.description: Category name as displayed (e.g. 'News', 'Around the Haus').

intro_prose.description: Optional curated intro prose above the post grid. May be empty for auto-generated category pages.

posts.description: Auto-generated list of posts in this category.
